FROM core.soldiers AS s
INNER JOIN core.units AS u ON s.unit_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN core.units AS u0 ON s.assigned_unit_id = u0.id
LEFT JOIN core.units AS u1 ON s.involved_unit_id = u1.id
INNER JOIN dict.dict_rank AS d ON s.rank_id = d.id
